result: If I could change the world in one way, I would make empathy the natural instinct for every person. Imagine if, before acting or speaking, everyone felt a genuine sense of connection to one another’s experiences. Policies would prioritize compassion, conflicts would be approached with understanding, and people would take care of the planet because they’d deeply feel their interconnectedness with all life. With empathy as a universal reflex, so many divides—social, political, environmental—could begin to heal.

prompt: If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
